title: Task
description: A single task accepted by `i2code plan` task-mutating commands. Used as the body of --task-file and as each item of the --tasks / --tasks-file arrays.

title.description: Human-readable, outcome-oriented task title (text after `Task X.Y:` in the rendered plan).

task_type.description: Verification category of the task. OUTCOME = introduces externally observable behavior. INFRA = enables build/test/run but does not introduce user-visible behavior on its own.

entrypoint.description: Exact shell command or execution path that runs the task (rendered as the `Entrypoint:` line, backticked).

observable.description: Precise, testable description of what changes when the entrypoint runs (stdout, exit code, file written, branch created, etc.).

evidence.description: Exact shell command that proves the observable via the entrypoint (rendered as the `Evidence:` line, backticked).

items.description: Single implementation step description, rendered as an unchecked `- [ ] ...` sub-bullet.

steps.description: Ordered list of implementation step descriptions. Each becomes an unchecked checklist item under the task.
